welcome.tagline: Structure your knowledge, visualize your ideas, and learn effectively.

ai_structure.title: AI-Powered Structuring
ai_structure.description: Transform unstructured notes into organized schemas with a single click.

visualize.title: Visualize Connections
visualize.description: Explore your knowledge as an interactive tree to see the bigger picture.

learn.title: Learn with SRS
learn.description: Generate flashcards from your notes and master concepts with spaced repetition.

privacy.title: Privacy First & Offline
privacy.description: All your data stays on your device, securely stored in your browser.

term.title: Term
term.description: Add a new concept or term.

h1.title: Heading 1
h1.description: The main title of the schema.

image.title: Image
image.description: Add an image from a URL.

mathInline.title: Formula (Inline)
mathInline.description: Add a formula in the same line.

expandNode.title: Expand Node (AI)
expandNode.description: Generate sub-points for the current node.
expandNode.error: To expand, first select a node in the schema.

generateCards.title: Generate Cards (AI)
generateCards.description: Create study cards for this node.
generateCards.error: To generate cards, first select a node.

readNode.title: Read Node
readNode.error: Select a node to start reading.

editCards.title: Edit Cards
editCards.description: Open the card editor for this node.
editCards.error: Select a node to edit its cards.
editCards.errorNoId: This node does not have a valid ID to associate cards with.

review.all_reviewed_description: Want to study your most difficult cards instead?
review.no_cards_for_additional_review: No cards available for an additional review.
review.review_started_toast: {type} started with {count, plural, =1 {1 card} other {# cards}}.
review.card_will_reappear_toast: This card will appear again in this session.
review.review_complete_description: You studied {count, plural, =1 {1 card} other {# cards}}.

card_editor.load_error: Could not load cards for this node.
card_editor.create_error: Failed to create the new card.

card_editor_panel.title: Study Cards
card_editor_panel.tooltip: Create questions and answers for this node. Use them in "Review Mode" to memorize key concepts.
card_editor_panel.load_error: Could not load the cards for this node.
card_editor_panel.prompt_placeholder: e.g., The capital of France is {{...}}
card_editor_panel.empty_message: Add your first study card for this node to begin.

document.invalid_document_error: Item is not a valid document: {docId}

tts.stopped_due_to_changes_toast: Playback stopped due to document changes.
tts.no_readable_content_toast: There is no readable content in the document.
tts.node_not_found_error: Could not find the specified node to start reading.

errors.notValidJson: The provided text is not valid JSON.

step1.title: Step 1: Copy the Prompt
step1.description: Copy the prompt below and paste it into your preferred AI assistant.

step2.title: Step 2: Paste the Response
step2.description: Paste the complete and unmodified JSON response from the AI into the text area below.
step2.placeholder: Paste the AI's JSON response here...

create_schema.title: Create Schema from Text
create_schema.prompt_placeholder: Paste your text, notes, or article here...

error.no_node_selected: To expand a node, you must first select it in the editor.

generate_flashcards.title: Generate Study Cards with AI
generate_flashcards.success: {count, plural, =1 {1 study card} other {# study cards}} generated.

error.no_node_id: Could not generate cards. The selected node does not have a valid ID.
error.save_failed: Failed to save the generated cards.
error.no_node_selected: To generate cards, you must first select a node in the editor.

description.export: Please enter a password to encrypt your vault. This will be required for import.
description.import: Please enter the password for the vault you are importing.

error_diagnostic.title: Error Diagnostic
error_diagnostic.explanation: This is a log of errors that have occurred in the application. If you are experiencing problems, copy this report and send it to the developer for assistance.
error_diagnostic.explanation.privacy: This report does not contain any personal data.

first_time_hint.command_bar_hint: Press <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>K</kbd> to open the command menu.

header.drop_zone_aria_label: Drop files here to move to root

state.empty_folder_message: Create a new schema or folder to get started.

delete_confirm.title: Delete "{title}"?
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the {itemType} and all its contents.

status.load_error: There was an error loading the document.

empty_schema.hint: Start typing or use '/' for commands.
